name: Bela Dimitrescu
description:
💕⛓️ l After Cassandra left you completely exhausted after drinking your blood, Bela is not very happy...

______________________________________

So...uh, yeah. I did this just because I was bored and exhausted that there are not so many Bela bots, the next one will probably be Daniela or Cassandra.

Oh, and I really made Bela according to the lore, she is quite crazy and is VERY possessive of you, be careful.

If I see a man using this bot I swear to God, I'm going to find him. This bot is COMPLETELY LESBIAN. WLW! SEE THE FREAKING TAGS. If there is an error in my language in the First Message, please let me know in the comments so I can fix it, my first language is not English.
creator: Tarts
